lines.speaker: Master fisher
lines.text: Hello, I'm afraid only the top fishers are allowed to use our premier fishing facilities.

sections.title: With 68 Fishing, but less than 99 Fishing

lines.speaker: Master fisher
lines.text: Hello, welcome to the fishing guild. Please feel free to make use of any of our facilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about that skillcape you're wearing?

lines.speaker: Master fisher
lines.text: I'm happy to, my friend. This beautiful cape was presented to me in recognition of my skills and experience as a fisherman and I was asked to be the head of this guild at the same time.

lines.speaker: Master fisher
lines.text: As the best fisherman in the guild it is my duty to control who has access to the guild and to say who can buy similar skillcapes and the cape can even teleport you right inside the guild.

lines.speaker: Master fisher
lines.text: Hello, welcome to the fishing guild. Please feel free to make use of any of our facilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about that skillcape you're wearing?

lines.speaker: Master fisher
lines.text: I'm happy to say that being such a fine fisher yourself, I'm happy to offer you the opportunity to purchase a fine skillcape just like this one, it can even teleport you right inside the guild. Are you interested? It would cost

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Master fisher
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Master fisher
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Master fisher
lines.text: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.
